hbf7d8a76g8c89g4d17g9ec2g47ee86eb59a5: I understand they're a sorry lot, but they're also not our problem.
h03bebd96g1267g42ccgbcc9g350a9b8b7acd: They made the wrong deal, but they got themselves into that mess. They can get themselves out.
hfe035fbag8965g4314g97c8g394c32694493: They need our help - we can't just leave them.
h52ccfa6eg75ccg4a08g9343g5e5957fac7fd: That is exactly what we can do!
h5859f713gd69cg4d5fgbb57gdf578a03fdb7: We have our own problems. Don't waste time chasing theirs.
h395dcc8bgeb2eg4320g912bgd9510461f2c3: There might be something in it for us.
h0ca52261g434bg403dgb874g8aa57fceb8a6: Don't you wish someone had helped you when you needed it?
h6c3d3133g5b83g47aag8ab9gc646b2d8b4a3: Don't you dare pretend to know what I needed.
h7eac54b7g3404g4e9bgad58g2737faeac1f4: I survived. On my own. If they can't do the same, they deserve everything they get.
